summary: Russian forces have deployed the new "Hexa-crane" heavy drone near Konstantinovka in Donetsk, using it to drop TM-62 anti-tank mines and destroy Ukrainian shelters. Ukrainian fixed-wing drone "Maya" was intercepted by the Russian "Elka" anti-drone system via kinetic strike, causing onboard detonation. The Russian "Klin" drone, carrying up to 5 kg warheads with autonomous targeting and a 120 km range, was recently shot down. Russian Ka-52 helicopter crew was eliminated near Nadiivka after a crash landing, with additional FPV strikes during evacuation. Meanwhile, Iranian-backed militias launched a fiber-optic FPV drone attack on US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian operators using "Rubikon" systems reported 94 enemy targets eliminated on March 23, 2026, across multiple sectors.
